title: M-3PO (Treedee)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:Treedee_SWJ11.jpg]] |name=M-3PO
"Treedee" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]{{JournalCite|11|The Farrimmer Cafe}} |line= |model= |class=[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height=1.7 meters |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Masculine programming]] |pronouns= |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= *Two [[Photoreceptor/Legends|visual]] and two [[Audio sensor/Legends|audial sensors]] - Human range *[[Vocabulator/Legends|Vocabulator]] speech/sound system *[[Broadband antenna/Legends|Broadband antenna]] *[[AA-1 VerboBrain/Legends|AA-1 VerboBrain]] *[[TranLang III communications module/Legends|TranLang III communications module]] with over seven million languages *Hidden storage compartment in right leg |affiliation= }} [[File:Farrimmer_Cafe_SWJ11.jpg|thumb|left|160px|Treedee greets visitors to the [[Farrimmer Cafe]]]] '''M-3PO''', also known as Treedee, was a [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]-[[Droid/Legends|cyborg]] relations droid that served at the [[Farrimmer Cafe]] as the maitre'd. Before becoming a maitre'd, Treedee monitored communications for the crew of the [[Mynock 7 Space Station]]. Treedee easily became sidetracked, so his owner had to sell Treedee to [[H'nib Statermast]]. Treedee then discovered that he would be the maitre'd of the Farrimmer, and was happy to finally work in an environment that utilized his talents and services. Treedee's name was a shortened form of the word "maitre'd." Treedee used the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] he would collect from his tips to buy oil baths, every now and again. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|11|The Farrimmer Cafe}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of M-3PO (Treedee)}} [[Category:Cybot Galactica products]] [[Category:Droids with masculine programming]] [[Category:Protocol droids]]
